name: Extract ZIP to Repository Root

on:
  push:
    paths:
      - '**.zip'

jobs:
  extract-zip:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: write

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Find and extract ZIP files
        run: |
          ZIP_FILES=$(git diff --name-only ${{ github.event.before }} ${{ github.sha }} | grep '\.zip$' || true)

          if [ -z "$ZIP_FILES" ]; then
            echo "No ZIP files found in this push."
            exit 0
          fi

          for ZIP in $ZIP_FILES; do
            if [ -f "$ZIP" ]; then
              echo "Extracting: $ZIP"

              # Extract to a temp directory
              TEMP_DIR=$(mktemp -d)
              unzip -o "$ZIP" -d "$TEMP_DIR"

              # Get the single top-level folder inside the zip
              TOP_LEVEL=$(ls -1 "$TEMP_DIR" | head -n 1)

              # Move contents of that top-level folder to repo root
              mv "$TEMP_DIR/$TOP_LEVEL"/* .
              mv "$TEMP_DIR/$TOP_LEVEL"/.[!.]* . 2>/dev/null || true

              # Cleanup temp
              rm -rf "$TEMP_DIR"

              echo "Done extracting $ZIP"
            else
              echo "ZIP file not found (may have been deleted): $ZIP"
            fi
          done

      - name: Remove ZIP files after extraction
        run: |
          ZIP_FILES=$(git diff --name-only ${{ github.event.before }} ${{ github.sha }} | grep '\.zip$' || true)
          for ZIP in $ZIP_FILES; do
            if [ -f "$ZIP" ]; then
              rm -f "$ZIP"
              echo "Removed: $ZIP"
            fi
          done

      - name: Commit extracted files
        run: |
          git config user.name  "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"

          git add -A

          if git diff --cached --quiet; then
            echo "Nothing to commit — no new files after extraction."
          else
            git commit -m "chore: extract uploaded ZIP files to repository root [skip ci]"
            git push
          fi
